candidates.observable_statement: Rowan Digital Infrastructure has begun construction on a 300MW hyperscale project outside San Antonio, Texas. The $900 million project is tailored to a top five U.S. technology company, with an initial 60MW planned for early 2026.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Capital inflow of $900 million into the data center infrastructure sector in Texas.
candidates.physical_implication: Construction of a 300MW data center campus.

candidates.observable_statement: Rowan Digital Infrastructure has begun construction on a 300MW hyperscale project outside San Antonio, Texas.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Physical expansion of data center capacity by 300MW in Texas.

candidates.observable_statement: with an initial 60MW planned for early 2026.
candidates.capital_flow_implication: Initial deployment of 60MW of data center capacity by early 2026.
candidates.physical_implication: Deployment of 60MW of data center capacity.
